name: Update addon registry

on:
  release:
    types: [published]

jobs:
  update-registry:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout this repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download the release jar and hash it
        run: |
          curl -sL "${{ github.event.release.assets[0].browser_download_url }}" -o addon.jar
          echo "sha256=$(sha256sum addon.jar | cut -d' ' -f1)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        id: hash

      - name: Wait for the current Cobalt SNAPSHOT build on JitPack
        run: |
          group_path="com/github/CobaltScripts"
          artifact="Cobalt"
          version="master-SNAPSHOT"
          status_url="https://jitpack.io/api/builds/com.github.CobaltScripts/$artifact/$version"

          status=""
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            status=$(curl -sL "$status_url" | jq -r '.status // empty')
            echo "JitPack build status: $status"
            if [ "$status" = "ok" ]; then
              break
            fi
            sleep 10
          done

          if [ "$status" != "ok" ]; then
            echo "JitPack build did not finish in time"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "group_path=$group_path" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "artifact=$artifact" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "version=$version" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        id: cobalt_build

      - name: Download the built Cobalt jar and hash it
        run: |
          jar_url="https://jitpack.io/${{ steps.cobalt_build.outputs.group_path }}/${{ steps.cobalt_build.outputs.artifact }}/${{ steps.cobalt_build.outputs.version }}/${{ steps.cobalt_build.outputs.artifact }}-${{ steps.cobalt_build.outputs.version }}.jar"
          curl -sL "$jar_url" -o cobalt.jar
          echo "sha256=$(sha256sum cobalt.jar | cut -d' ' -f1)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
        id: cobalt_hash

      - name: Checkout registry repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: EvilPiza/addon-registry
          token: ${{ secrets.REGISTRY_PUSH_TOKEN }}
          path: registry

      - name: Patch registry.json
        run: |
          jq --arg ver "${{ github.event.release.tag_name }}" \
             --arg hash "${{ steps.hash.outputs.sha256 }}" \
             --arg url "${{ github.event.release.assets[0].browser_download_url }}" \
             --arg cobaltVer "${{ steps.cobalt_build.outputs.version }}" \
             --arg cobaltHash "${{ steps.cobalt_hash.outputs.sha256 }}" \
             '(.addons[] | select(.id == "mightystore") | .latest) = {version: $ver, cobaltVersion: $cobaltVer, cobaltSha256: $cobaltHash, downloadUrl: $url, sha256: $hash}' \
             registry/registry.json > registry/registry.tmp.json
          mv registry/registry.tmp.json registry/registry.json

      - name: Commit and push
        run: |
          cd registry
          git config user.name "release-bot"
          git config user.email "release-bot@users.noreply.github.com"
          git commit -am "Update mightystore to ${{ github.event.release.tag_name }}"
          git push
